ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the organization's website */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the organization */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the organization was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the organization */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the organization (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the organization entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the organization entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization that owns the project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the project's website or repository */,
  "programming_languages" TEXT /* Programming languages used in the project */,
  "categories" TEXT /* Categories or tags for the project (e.g., web, mobile, desktop) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tags" (
  "project_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-tag association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tags_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, contributor) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., maintainer, contributor) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date the user joined the project */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Date the user left the project (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue is associated with */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was last updated */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user the issue is assigned to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the pull request is associated with */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pull request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pull request (e.g., open, closed, merged) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the pull request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the pull request was last updated */,
  "submitted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the pull request */,
  "merged_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who merged the pull request */,
  "merged_at" TEXT /* Date the pull request was merged (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_submitted_by FOREIGN KEY ("submitted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_merged_by FOREIGN KEY ("merged_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pr_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request the review is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, changes requested) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pr_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pr_reviews_pr_id FOREIGN KEY ("pr_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the project */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the dependency is associated with */,
  "dependency_name" TEXT /* Name of the dependency */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dependency */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., library, framework) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dependency entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the dependency entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the license is associated with */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the license text */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the license entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the license entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the documentation is associated with */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the documentation */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the documentation */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the documentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the documentation entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the documentation entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution guideline entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the guideline is associated with */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the guideline */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the guideline */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the guideline entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the guideline entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contribution_guidelines_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the analytics are associated with */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked (e.g., views, downloads, contributions) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_analytics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., theme, notification settings) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the preference entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the preference entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key string */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the API key was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date the API key expires */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Date the API key was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Session token */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the session was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date the session expires */,
  "last_activity_at" TEXT /* Date of the last activity in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., issue created, pull request merged) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the event was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_terms" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search term */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_term" TEXT /* Search term used */,
  "search_at" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_terms_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, project view) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the activity was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "github_integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GitHub integration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the integration is associated with */,
  "github_repo" TEXT /* GitHub repository name */,
  "github_token" TEXT /* GitHub access token */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the integration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_github_integration_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gitlab_integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GitLab integration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the integration is associated with */,
  "gitlab_repo" TEXT /* GitLab repository name */,
  "gitlab_token" TEXT /* GitLab access token */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the integration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gitlab_integration_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external contributor */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the contributor is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the contributor entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the contributor entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_contributors_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
